title: Christmas Wooden Chopping Board with Mini Knife – Gingerbread Man Design, Durable Acacia Wood Cheese Board, Easy to Clean Serving Platter for Home, Kitchen and Food Prep
features: Add festive charm to your celebrations with this acacia wood chopping board, featuring a playful gingerbread man design that brings style and joy to any Christmas gathering.
Crafted from durable, high-quality acacia wood, the board offers a sturdy surface ideal for cheese, cured meats, fruit, or nibbles, creating an attractive centrepiece for guests.
Complete with a matching mini knife, this set makes entertaining effortless, giving you everything needed to slice and serve cheeses or festive snacks with ease and style.
Measuring approximately 27cm x 23cm x 1cm, the board is compact enough for most table settings yet spacious enough to hold a variety of foods for family and friends.
Easy to clean and designed to last, the strong acacia wood construction ensures longevity, making this board both a functional serving piece and a thoughtful festive gift.
description: Product Description Festive Chopping & Serving Boards Add charm to your holiday hosting with these festive chopping boards, perfect for preparing or serving cheese, snacks, and treats. Crafted from durable wood, they’re practical for everyday use while bringing a seasonal touch to your kitchen or dining table. Stylish, sturdy, and easy to clean. Playful Design, Practical Style Gingerbread Man Chopping Board Set Serve festive favourites with this acacia wood chopping board, shaped like a gingerbread man. Durable and easy to clean, it’s perfect for cheese, meats, and nibbles, and comes with a matching knife for effortless entertaining. A charming addition to your table or a thoughtful Christmas gift. Add a Playful Gingerbread Touch to Your Table Bring seasonal cheer to your entertaining with this charming gingerbread-shaped chopping board. Perfect for serving cheeses, fruits, or nibbles, it combines festive design with everyday practicality, creating a warm, inviting centrepiece for any celebration. Beautifully Crafted Acacia Wood + Cheese Knife Made from durable acacia wood, this board offers a sturdy, smooth surface ideal for slicing and serving. The matching mini cheese knife adds both style and function, helping you prepare and present festive treats effortlessly throughout the holiday season.
